_comment: Build-time search-quality overrides, applied by build_db.py after dedup and before embedding so BOTH the FTS index and the vector embedding reflect the corrected text. This is the durable home for golden-eval fixes (eval_golden.py): editing the live SQLite directly is lost on the next rebuild, but overrides here are re-applied every build. Injectable via --overrides / CMDHUB_BUILD_OVERRIDES. 'add' inserts a command (skipped if its app_id is absent or the path already exists); 'patch' edits an existing command by cmd_path (topics_append concatenates, description replaces).

add.description: Deletes files and directories from the filesystem
add.topics: rm delete files remove directories filesystem linux unix coreutils dangerous trash

rm.recursive.topics_append: delete remove files rm linux coreutils trash dangerous

rm.verbose.topics_append: delete remove files rm linux coreutils

rm.force.topics_append: delete remove files force rm linux

rm.interactive.topics_append: delete remove files interactive rm linux

chmod.description: Change the file mode bits / permissions of each FILE (read, write, execute) using symbolic or octal notation
chmod.topics_append: change file permissions mode access rights octal executable readable writable chmod coreutils

chown.description: Change the user and/or group ownership of each FILE
chown.topics_append: change file owner ownership user group chown coreutils permissions
